_meta.notes: Portal rates change daily. This is a snapshot for top merchants. Always verify current rates at cashbackmonitor.com which compares all portals in real time. Portals require fresh browser session, click-through to merchant, and 30-90 day credit window.

rakuten.payout: cash (or Amex MR if Amex linked, often higher rates in MR mode)
rakuten.notes: Largest portal. Often has elevated bonuses (e.g., Apple bonus to 6%). Linking Amex to receive payout in MR sometimes shows 1-2% higher rates than cash mode.

topcashback.notes: Best base rates for most merchants. Slower to credit but reliable.

capital_one_shopping.payout: Capital One Shopping Rewards (redeemable as Amazon GCs or check)
capital_one_shopping.notes: Auto-applies coupons at checkout. Rates often comparable to Rakuten. Available even without Cap One credit card.

united_mileageplus_x.notes: Mobile app for dining + retail miles. Linked dining + retail purchases earn 1-3 miles per dollar.

aadvantage_eshopping.notes: Similar to other airline portals. AA also has the SimplyMiles dining program.

hilton_shopping_mall.notes: Modest rates. Typically 1-3 Hilton points per dollar at major retailers.

Apple.best_during_holiday: Watch for Black Friday 5%+ from Rakuten

important_caveats: Mobile app purchases often don't track. Use desktop or mobile browser.
Closing tabs between portal click and checkout invalidates the cookie.
Some merchants explicitly exclude purchases on certain product lines (Apple device upgrades, Best Buy MacBooks, etc.).
Recurring subscriptions only credit the FIRST payment, not renewals.
